message:
refactor(fcp-host): migrate protocol types from fcp-core to fcp-kernel

Systematic migration of type imports in fcp-host from fcp_core to
fcp_kernel, separating kernel protocol types (lifecycle, introspection,
invocation, health) from policy types (capabilities, safety tiers,
zones) that remain in fcp-core.

Types moved to fcp_kernel imports:
- Identity: ConnectorId, OperationId, RequestId, InstanceId
- Lifecycle: LifecycleError, LifecycleManager, LifecycleRecord,
  LifecycleState, LifecycleStatus, TransitionReason
- Introspection: HandshakeRequest/Response, Introspection, SelfCheck*
- Invocation: InvokeRequest/Response/Status, SimulateRequest/Response
- Health: HealthSnapshot, HealthState
- Operations: AgentHint, ApprovalMode, IdempotencyClass, OperationInfo,
  RateLimitDeclarations
- Budget: BudgetEnforcement/Status, UsageBudget*, UsageMetric*
- Rollout: CanaryPolicy, CrashLoopDetector, RolloutAudit*, RolloutDecision

Types remaining in fcp_core imports:
- Policy: ApprovalToken, Capability*, Decision, DecisionReceiptPolicy
- Safety: RiskLevel, SafetyTier, ConnectorHealth
- Zones: ZoneId, ZonePolicyObject, ZoneTransportPolicy
- Supply chain: SoftwareBillOfMaterials, SupplyChainAttestation

Part of the fcp-host layering refactor (bead tbjdk — FCP3/P4.1).

Files: agent_api.rs, bin/fcp-host.rs, discovery.rs, doctor.rs,
rollout.rs — pure import changes, no logic modifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
